summary.zh: 国内更新镜像更可靠，AtomGit/GitCode 附件上传会正确保留签名头，并在重跑时安全跳过已同步文件。
summary.en: Domestic update mirroring is more reliable: AtomGit/GitCode asset uploads now preserve signed headers and safely skip files that are already mirrored.

title.zh: 修复 AtomGit 附件上传

summary.zh: 发布镜像会按 GitCode 返回的签名上传要求发送安装包，避免国内镜像缺少安装附件。
summary.en: Release mirroring now sends installers with the signed upload headers returned by GitCode, preventing missing installer assets on the domestic mirror.

details.zh: 上传请求改为一次性字节上传，并保留对象存储签名绑定的 Content-Type。
details.en: Uploads now use buffered bytes and preserve the Content-Type bound to the object-storage signature.

sources.title: fix: upload atomgit release assets as buffered puts

summary.zh: 如果同名附件已经在 AtomGit 上存在，脚本会先校验大小，相同才跳过，避免重复上传或静默覆盖不一致文件。
summary.en: When an asset already exists on AtomGit, the script verifies its size before skipping it, avoiding duplicate uploads or silent mismatches.

sources.title: fix: upload atomgit release assets as buffered puts
